'''Fabrillan''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malthor]]. It was a hotbed of activity during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Fabrillan also had a large population of [[Reigat]]s. It had a slum area, known as [["Downside"]], where the Reigat [[Bakku]] lived. [[Reginna Bel Typolla]] worked as a docking attendant at the busy [[Fabrillan City Spaceport]].<ref name="SWAJ10:WBC" />
